OVERRULED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 2) WRONGRUL EVICTION AND 5) UNFAIR COMPETITION. PLAINTIFF SUBMITS A PROPOSED ORDER AND A COPY. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, NOT REPORTED

3) Fraud - to allege fraud against corporate entities with requisite particularity.
6) Contract(s) - to allege contract that was/were breached.
